audience: Writers, creators, marketers, and curious professionals who want to use AI as a practical writing assistant
positioning: Teach readers how to write better with leading AI platforms, understand AI writing concepts, and choose useful tools.
voice_notes: Clear, approachable, practical, and instructional. Explain technical ideas in plain English. Lead with the reader's question, use concrete examples and step-by-step guidance, and keep the tone encouraging without overselling. Avoid generic marketing language and never invent first-person experiences.
